channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: SHIB in a lockstep range: bears tug, bulls pause. Is a breakout coming or more consolidation through April? 🔒📈 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260325-price-prediction-shib-technical-consolidation-suggests-limited-movement-through #SHIB #crypto #priceaction

item.title: WLD looks set for a bounce—but can it clear $0.33? A quiet setup hints at a test toward $0.35 in 4–6 weeks if support holds. 🔎💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260325-price-prediction-wld-worldcoin-eyes-035-recovery-by-april #crypto #Worldcoin #WLD

item.title: SUI ready to break the ceiling? A clean move past $0.99 could aim $1.06–$1.15—but $0.91 holds the line. 📈💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260325-price-prediction-target-sui-breaking-above-100-could-115-by #crypto #SUI #trading
